# Neural Link list_transactions ‚Äî undo-stack audit/history tool

## Context

Slice-1 (`undo`, #13221) + the `redo` half of Slice-2 (#13304) shipped + merged. #9848 (the undo-stack umbrella) lists `list_transactions` among its tools ‚Äî *"Audit what an agent changed and when."* The in-heap `Neo.ai.TransactionService` already exposes the read API (`stackOf({id})` ‚Üí deep-cloned `{open, committed, redo}`, `src/ai/TransactionService.mjs:385`). This ticket adds the `list_transactions` NL tool ‚Äî a read-only projection of the writer's transaction history, so an agent (or a conversational-UI user) can answer *"what have you changed?"* before deciding to undo/redo.

## The Problem

The undo stack is mutable (`undo`/`redo`) but NOT introspectable from the agent surface ‚Äî there is no tool to LIST the committed transactions (what is undoable, in what order, what each did). An agent can `undo`/`redo` blindly but can't show or audit the history. `stackOf` is the in-heap read API but is not exposed as a tool.

## The Fix

A **read-tier** `list_transactions` NL tool, mirroring the merged `undo`/`redo` wiring (#13257 / #13304):
- Server-side `ai/services/neural-link/InstanceService.list_transactions({sessionId})` ‚Üí forwards over the bridge.
- In-app `src/ai/client/InstanceService.listTransactions(params, context)` ‚Üí `transactionService.stackOf({id: writer-pair})`, projects to a read **summary**: `{committed: [{txId, status, label, opCount}], redo: [...]}` (audit view ‚Äî NOT the raw reverse-ops). Read-only; no enforcement, no replay.
- Wire the 6 sites: `openapi.yaml` path + `read` tier + schema; `toolService.mjs` serviceMapping; the server-side forward; `Client.mjs` dispatch; the in-app method; `OpenApiValidatorCompliance.spec` tier fixture (read tier ‚Üí NOT in the dangerous-read-forbidden set).
- Add the `list_transactions` row to `learn/agentos/NeuralLink.md` ‚Äî the just-merged #13318 `GuideToolParity` guard now enforces doc==openapi parity, so a new tool **requires** its doc-row or the guard fails in CI (the guard working as designed).

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `list_transactions` returns the writer's committed transaction history (txId, status, label, op-count per tx), newest-last, read-only.
- [ ] Fail-closed on incomplete writer identity (mirrors undo/redo), returning an empty/clear result rather than throwing.
- [ ] Wired through all 6 sites + the `NeuralLink.md` doc-row (the #13318 guard passes).
- [ ] Unit test: the projection of a multi-tx stack + the read-tier compliance fixture.

## Out of Scope

- Named transaction batching (`begin_transaction` / `commit_transaction`) ‚Äî the other Slice-2 remainder, a separate leaf.
- Returning the raw reverse-ops (a summary suffices for audit; the raw ops are internal).
- Cross-session / persisted history (Slice-3, Memory-Core).

## Related

Parent: #9848 (undo-stack umbrella). Siblings: #13221 (undo), #13304 (redo), #13318 (the drift guard that enforces the doc-row). Refs #13012 (Agent Harness Pillar-2). Read API: `src/ai/TransactionService.mjs` `stackOf`.

Origin Session ID: a0bc6b23-78c5-4bd7-b944-9db5e236f42d

Release classification: boardless (Slice-2 read tool on the undo substrate ‚Äî not v13-release-blocking).

## Contract Ledger ‚Äî `list_transactions` (T3, public MCP tool)

Backfilled per the #13329 review, in the canonical [`contract-ledger.md`](../blob/dev/learn/agentos/process/contract-ledger.md) schema.

| Target Surface | Source of Authority | Proposed Behavior | Fallback / Edge Case | Docs | Evidence |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| `list_transactions` MCP tool ‚Äî `POST /instance/transactions` (operationId `list_transactions`, `read` tier) | #13326 + #9848 (undo-stack umbrella); `Neo.ai.TransactionService#stackOf` | Non-consuming projection of the requester's undo state ‚Üí `{committed: Summary[], redo: Summary[]}`, `Summary = {txId, status, opCount, labels}`. Read-only ‚Äî never mutates the stack. Raw `forward`/`reverse` op descriptors **excluded** (data-not-code minimization). | No writer identity (`null` context) OR no stack authority ‚Üí `{committed: [], redo: []}` (empty lists, never throws). N reads idempotent. | `openapi.yaml` `/instance/transactions` + `ListTransactionsRequest`; `NeuralLink.md` row | L1: `InstanceServiceListTransactions.spec` (projection + read-only + fail-closed); `OpenApiValidatorCompliance.spec` (read tier; correctly excluded from `neuralLinkDangerousReadForbidden` ‚Äî a safe read); `GuideToolParity.spec` (doc==openapi) |
| `ListTransactionsRequest.sessionId` | `openapi.yaml` `ListTransactionsRequest` | Optional ‚Äî the target App Worker session, injected by the MCP routing layer (not an agent-supplied param). | Routing-layer supplied. | `openapi.yaml` schema | `OpenApiValidatorCompliance.spec` (schema parse) |

Writer key = the `(agentId, sessionId)` pair (the Bridge-stamped enforcement identity), as undo/redo. Shipped at PR #13329 head `2b22f7b06`.
